description.en: An importer for built-in modules. All known built-in modules are listed in sys.builtin_module_names. This class implements the importlib.abc.MetaPathFinder and importlib.abc.InspectLoader ABCs. Only class methods are defined by this class to alleviate the need for instantiation. Changed in version 3.5: As part of PEP 489, the builtin importer now implements Loader.create_module() and Loader.exec_module()

description.en: A list of strings representing the recognized file suffixes for bytecode modules (including the leading dot). Added in version 3.3. Changed in version 3.5: The value is no longer dependent on __debug__.
